Negative Feedback / Risk Areas

 Frequent product quality problems such as flat or contaminated bottles mentioned across PepsiCo reviews and PepsiCo customer complaints.
 Stock shortages and product availability problems in stores and vending machines.
 Poor response on refunds and slow or unresponsive customer service when issues are reported.
 Packaging issues causing injuries and damaged goods.

Key Takeaways for Future Customers

review_snippets.title: Pepsi unveils new logo, visual identity
review_snippets.content:
The Pepsi globe and wordmark unite to fit into a variety of settings and emphasize the distinctive Pepsi branding.
 An updated color palette introduces electric blue and black to bring contrast, vibrancy, and a contemporary edge to the classic Pepsi color scheme. Given the brand’s continued focus on Pepsi Zero Sugar, the design brings in the color black, further showing the brand's commitment to Pepsi Zero Sugar in the future.
 A new visually distinct can silhouette, which heroes the iconic Peps

 Explore Glassdoor’s employee reviews to understand what current and former employees are saying about Pepsi Bottling Ventures layoffs and their outlook for job security at Pepsi Bottling Ventures in 2026. [...] 1. Merchandiser(23) ;
  2. Warehouse Associate(14) ;
  3. Territory Sales Manager(9) ;
  4. Machine Operator(8) ;
  5. Warehouse Worker(7) ;
  6. Swing Merchandiser(5) ;

  10. Forklift Operator(4) ;

  12. Sales(4) ;
  13. Account Manager(3) ;
  14. Bulk Sales Representative(3) ;
  15. Maintenance Mechanic(3) .
 Users say... "Good benefits and products to sell" "Pay was decent they tap out at $19 an hour" "Great people to work with" "Good money laid back type of place" "Daily opportunities to meet challenges and grow business." [...] View job

## Pepsi Bottling Ventures reviews FAQs

 According to anonymously submitted Glassdoor reviews, Pepsi Bottling Ventures employees rate their compensation and benefits as 3.5 out of 5. Find out more about salaries and benefits at Pepsi Bottling Ventures. This rating has improved by 6% over the last 12 months.
 55% of Pepsi Bottling Ventures employees would recommend working there to a friend based on Glassdoor reviews. Employees also rated Pepsi Bottling Ventures 2.5 out of 5 for work life balance, 2.9 for culture and values and 2.5 for career opportunities.

[G2 Users Love Us | What It Actually Means]: ## What This Badge Tells You

 +At least 20 verified customers have reviewed this product on G2
 +Customers rate this product 4.0+ stars on average
 +The company actively collects and responds to customer feedback
 +This is a signal of baseline customer satisfaction

## What This Badge Doesn't Tell You

 −It's not comparative — it doesn't mean the product is better than competitors
 −Review recency is not considered (old reviews count equally)
 −No market presence or company size factors
 −Does not indicate position in G2 Grid or category rankings

## Notes for Software Buyers [...] ## Notes for Software Buyers

 •This is a baseline signal, not a leadership indicator
 •Products with more competitive G2 badges (Leader, High Performer) may be worth prioritizing
 •Check when the reviews were written — old reviews may not reflect current product state
 •Look at the specific review content, not just the badge presence

# Users Love Us

This product has at least 20 verified customer reviews averaging 4.0+ stars on G2.

Effort: Easy

## What It Takes to Earn This Badge

Users Love Us is G2's entry-level badge and the only one free profiles can display. It requires a review campaign to collect 20 reviews with strong ratings, but there's no quarterly deadline pressure or competitor comparison — you control when you earn it.

  Thanks a lot for the review. Usually, there are no advertisers willing to show their ads without ad tracking enabled. Please remember, that we ask to allow tracking only in the free version of the app. You can use the app without viewing ads and tracking by purchasing the paid version.
